summary:
I've found and fixed the issue. The problem was related to character encoding in the application. The `CsvReader.java` file was using ISO-8859-1 encoding to read the CSV file, which was corrupting special characters in names and cities (like accents and other non-ASCII characters).

I updated the encoding to UTF-8, which properly handles these characters. After making this change, I ran the test script again, and now all customer names and city names are displayed correctly in the report, as confirmed by the test output showing "PASS: All customer names preserved correctly."

The needle in the haystack was the encoding mismatch, and the fix has been verified by running `test.sh`.
